reason: Global TianChen-RV boundaries: unified RISC-V MLIR, C++/MLIR stack, no descriptor-driven compute, RVV as extension family.
Keep tcrv.exec as execution envelope and runtime ABI/control boundary, not compute IR.
RVV selected vector-shape/config and runtime AVL/VL separation for finite i32 binary routes.
Use extension-family ops through common EmitC route; avoid descriptor-to-C export.
Runtime ABI ownership, selected-plan metadata, target artifact export, and runtime AVL/VL contract.
Required lit/FileCheck/build/RVV evidence shape for vector frontend and artifact routes.
Previous fixed vector source extent boundary and fixed n==16 regression contract.
Added dynamic vector/SCF source runtime extent contract fields, validation, and artifact comment body.
Accepted exactly one bounded dynamic vector/SCF i32-vadd source wrapper and materialized source %n authority on kernel/runtime_param.
Propagated dynamic runtime AVL authority into selected config and direct RVV source/header/object artifacts without fixed n==16 trap.
Propagated dynamic runtime AVL authority into dispatch source/header artifacts and bundle comments.
Added bounded vector frontend evidence runner switch and dynamic runtime extent evidence parsing for ssh rvv counts.
